svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="多租户行级隔离三层兜底" id="mtIso1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-544" dy="-188" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1180" pageHeight="620" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="r1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="HTTP 请求
Header: X-Tenant-Id" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="TenantFilter
解析 X-Tenant-Id
塞入请求级上下文" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="280" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="TenantContext
(ThreadLocal)
请求全程可取" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="540" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="业务 SQL
必须带 tenant_id 条件
(含每个 JOIN)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="800" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ed1" edge="1" parent="1" source="r1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="f1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ed2" edge="1" parent="1" source="f1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="c1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ed3" edge="1" parent="1" source="c1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="s1" value="漏带了?"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="grp" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#1e293b;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;spacingTop=6;" value="三层兜底:假设迟早有人会漏,提前把网织好" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="320" width="960" x="40" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="① SQL 审查清单
每个 JOIN 必带
a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
评审逐条过,不凭感觉" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="220" x="80" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="② 契约扫描
扫 MyBatis / 原生 SQL
找 JOIN 验 tenant_id
漏带的 PR 直接标红" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="220" x="350" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="③ 评审回路(枢纽)
扫描器喂疑点给评审 Agent
Agent 逐条判漏带/豁免/存疑
人对存疑做最终拍板" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="240" x="620" y="295" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ed4" edge="1" parent="1" source="g1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="g2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ed5" edge="1" parent="1" source="g2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="g3" value="疑点"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="res" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="想漏一个 tenant_id,得同时骗过三关" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="380" x="350" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ed6" edge="1" parent="1" source="g3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;dashed=1;" target="res" value="层层兜"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ed7" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;dashed=1;" target="g3" value="假设会漏"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
